- BCM_IS_BLANK_S = true

Information sent by the light sensor
Linked to LIN parameter ALS (RLSS_LINRLSW_R_01 frame)

LIGHT_REQUEST_BY_LIGHT_SENSOR = 1 when ALS = 1

LMF_AutoLiftDown.comment: Express lift down LMF message duration

LMF_AutoLiftUp.comment: Express lift up LMF message duration

LMF_ManualLiftDown.comment: manual lift down LMF message duration

LMF_ManualLiftUp.comment: manual lift up LMF message duration

LMF_ShortDropDown.comment: Short drop down LMF message duration

LMF_ShortDropUp.comment: Short drop up LMF message duration

LOCAI_ACTIVE.comment:
The parameter LocAI can be written only if the following conditions are fulfilled :
-  VEHICLE_SPEED = 0 and not SPEED_UNAVAILABLE_OR_INVALID
-  VEHICLE_STATE = VEHICLE_ASLEEP_ENGINE_STOPPED or VEHICLE_AWAKE_ENGINE_STOPPED
-  BCM_IS_BLANK_S = true

lists.0: Use of door handle optical sensor to unlock
lists.1: Use of door handle buttons to lock and unlock

LONG_CDL_INDICATOR_TM_TP.comment: Long delay before switching off the CDL indicator.

LONG_DELAYED_L1_TM_TP.comment: Delay before the power level 1 is switched from ON to OFF when long timeout is positioned

lists.4: Exit by release of the button
lists.3: Exit by reception by same CID other button press
lists.2: Exit by reception of other CID  press

LONG_PRESS_DECODED_EXIT.comment: wrong SW coding for this parameter. See RA BCM 368.

LONG_START_PRESS_TM_TP.comment: Duration of start button press that stop the engine when a long press confirmation is requested (card not detected at first press)

LWS_BATT_VOLTAGE_THRESH_TP.comment: Maximum battery voltage to authorize a lock with speed

MAX_ABSENT_CARD_ARMED_TM_TP.comment: BCM Internal timeout for the A&AC to answer to an authentication request. After this timeout, a missed authentication will not result in a message displayed to the customer

MAX_AIRBAG_WAKE_UP_TM_TP.comment: maximum duration for an airbag unit wake up

MAX_AUTHENTICATION_TM_TP.comment: Maximum ID authentication by A&AC timeout. When this delay is elapsed, the ignition OFF to ON sequence is immediately aborted.

MAX_BREAKING_IN_NUMBER_TP.comment: Maximum number of alarm feedback activation during an alarm activation.

MAX_CARD_IN_READER_ARMED_TM_TP.comment: BCM Internal timeout for the A&AC to answer to an authentication request. After this timeout, a successfull authentication in reader will not result in a message displayed to the customer

MAX_COLUMN_LOCK_CONDITION_TM_TP.comment: Maximum time to obtain the steering lock condition before to send the lock request

MAX_CRANK_ON_VERLOG_NOK_TM_TP.comment: Maximum time to activate the starter without a VERLOG success after a starter request by BCM

MAX_CUST_CONFIRM_ENG_STOP_TM_TP.comment: Maximum time to confirm an engine stop request by a long start btn press after a normal engine stop request

MAX_ENGINE_RESTART_TM_TP.comment: Maximum time to restart the engine after engine stall

MAX_ENGINE_START_SEQ_TM_TP.comment: Maximum time for an engine start sequence. When this delay is elapsed, the engine start sequence is immediately aborted.

MAX_ENGINE_STOP_TM_TP.comment: Maximum time for the USM to switch off Ignition when BCM try to stop the engine. After that timeout, the ignition is requested ON by BCM

MAX_FAILURE_DETECTED.comment: Filtering value used to confirmed a failure; The value 0 means that a detection is automatically a confirmed failure.

MAX_NB_DOOR_WARNING_REQUEST_TP.comment: Maximum number of door open warning when the vehicle is running during a mission

MAX_NB_LOCK_REQUESTS_BY_LWS_TP.comment: Maximum number of lock with speed during a mission

MAX_NO_CUSTOMER_ACTION_TM_TP.comment: Maximum time to detect the customer departure with no action after a driving cycle

MAX_R_L3_BY_CUSTOMER_REQ_TM_TP.comment: Maximum duration of power level 3 on after valid card insertion, engine start sequence failure or atypical engine stop

MAX_STEER_UNLOCK_ANSWER_TM_TP.comment: Maximum time to receive the steering lock answer after an unlocking request

MAX_STEERING_LOCK_ANSWER_TM_TP.comment: Maximum time to receive the steering lock answer after a locking request

MAX_TIME_WAKE_UP_BY_WIRE_TM_TP.comment: Maximum time for BCM wake-up by wired input.

MAX_VALUE_THERMAL_PROTECTION_TP.comment: maximum value for thermal protection value

MOTOR_SYNCHRONIZATION_TM_TP.comment: Time to synchronize the door motors between BCM and DCM.

lists.0: No start sequence initiated since last reset
lists.1: Last L3 sequence was a success

N3_FAILED_CS.comment: root cause of the PowerLevel_3 request failure

NB_TEST_PASSED.comment: Filtering value used to leave the failure confirmed state; The value 0 means that the transition is executed a the first passed test.

NEUTRAL_CONTACT_CONFIRM_TM_TP.comment: Time to confirm the value of neutral contact value after ignition supply on.

NUMBER_ENABLE_TP.comment: Number of Doorlock actions to deactivate the thermal protection

O_APC2_RL.comment: APC2 (engine running) relay coil command (low side)

O_APC2_RL_DTC_CF.comment: Value should not be modified (always 0), otherwise DTC rises when engine starts (see RA375).

O_LOCK_DOORS.comment: Lock rear door motors command state

O_PWM_ROOMLAMP_1.comment: Read value only when the value is stable.

O_PWM_ROOMLAMP_2.comment: Read value only when the value is stable.

O_PWM_ROOMLAMP_3.comment: Read value only when the value is stable.

O_PWM_ROOMLAMP_4.comment: Read value only when the value is stable.

O_RR_WIPER.comment: Electrical state 0 or 12V of the rear wiper motor command

O_SAFETY_LINE_BDU.comment: Safety line electrical state; ALLOWED_TO_COMMUTE; NOT_ALLOWED_TO_PROCEED

O_STEERING_WHEEL_HORN_RL.comment: Relay output command state, Output activation state

O_SUPERLOCK_RR.comment: Rear superlock motors state (available for some configurations only)

O_UNLOCK_DOORS.comment: Unlock rear door motors command state

O_UNLOCK_FUEL.comment: Fuel lid motor command state (available for some configurations only)

lists.1: BCM to unlock UNLOCK motors (R_UNLOCK_BY_DIAG in statemate)
lists.0: BCM to lock LOCK motors (send R_LOCK_BY_DIAG in statemate)

lists.2: BCM to flash both DI lamps (DI_LAMP_BY_DIAG=LEFT_AND_RIGHT_ON in statemate)
lists.0: BCM to flash Left DI lamps (DI_LAMP_BY_DIAG = LEFT_ON_AND_RIGHT_OFF in statemate)
lists.1: BCM to flash Rightt DI lamps (DI_LAMP_BY_DIAG=LEFT_OFF_AND_RIGHT_ON in statemate)
BCM to unlock fuel lid actuator (send R_UNLOCK_FUEL_BY_DIAG in statemate)
lists.0: BCM to lock fuel lid actuator (send R_LOCK_FUEL_BY_DIAG in statemate)

lists.1: BCM to unlock Gloves Box motors in car body type E (send R_UNLOCK_GLOVES_BOX_BY_DIAG in statemate)
lists.0: BCM to lock Gloves Box motors in car body type E (send R_LOCK_GLOVES_BOX_BY_DIAG in statemate)
BCM to lock SUPERLOCK motors (send R_SUPERLOCK_BY_DIAG in statemate)
lists.1: BCM to unlock SUPERLOCK motors (send R_DIAG_SUPERUNLOCK_BY_DIAG in statemate)

OH_ElectricalPowerDrived.comment: Electrical power driven by BCM (announced a few time before its achievement)

OH_PTCEngineIdleSpeedRequest.comment: Idle engine speed request to ensure PTC optimal working

OH_PTCThermalRegulatorFreeze.comment: Information for thermal regulation managed in climate ECU

OPEN_ASDM_SYNCHRONIZATION_TM_TP.comment: Time to synchronize the door motors unlocking by BCM and rear doors opening by ASDM.

PaddingDatas.comment: Spaces in Ascii, added to complete the frame request $2184, tracability

PAUSE_TIME_TP.comment: Pause time between two doorlock actions

PERIMETRIC_ALARM_CF.comment: perimetric alarm is part of the "pack stress"

Position_roue.comment: The parameter could be written only if the configuration parameter PRESENCE_SSPP = 1.

PowerOpticalCapter_TP.comment: Supplying time for optical handle sensors

lists.11: Tension d'entrée du SR trop faible
lists.12: Tension d'entrée du SR trop haute
lists.7: Tme out de tension SR non atteinte
lists.5: Tension de sortie du SR trop haute
lists.4: Tension de sortie du SR trop basse

PPCC+12_Sur_Alim_Du_Lecteur_Badge.comment: Short to supply on card reader

PPCCMasse sur alim du lecteur badge.comment: Short to ground on card reader

PPCommLecteur de badge.comment: Failure on card reader serial line comm, detected also if supply failure

PPTrpAntenna.comment: Problem on card reader informations exchange
